seoTitle: Kauring vs Kealy — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kauring and Kealy. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kauring and Kealy.
heading: Kauring vs Kealy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kauring, Western Australia and Kealy, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kauring has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Kealy (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kauring or Kealy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kauring has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Kealy scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kauring scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Kealy scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kauring or Kealy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kauring has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
